title: Hadapsar Warehouse Burglary
description: A electronics goods warehouse in Hadapsar MIDC was broken into over a Sunday night. Roof access used — skylight forced open. Approximately Rs 22 lakhs of laptops and smartphones stolen. Security guard was drugged — tea found to contain sedative.
modus_operandi: Roof entry via skylight, security guard sedated, inside knowledge suspected, Sunday night timing, high-value electronics target.

suspects.description: Male, athletic build, roof access suggests climbing ability

evidence.description: Forced skylight with tool marks matching a bolt cutter
Sedative (Alprazolam) found in guard's tea flask
IMEI numbers of stolen devices flagged on resale platforms within 10 days

blind_spots: Inside knowledge angle not investigated until day 7
Stolen device IMEI tracking not initiated until day 10
Roof access points of adjacent warehouses not checked
resolution: IMEI flagged on OLX listing. Buyer traced to seller — a former warehouse employee. Arrested day 14.
